headline: CON EDISON REPORTS 2026 FIRST QUARTER EARNINGS
summary: Consolidated Edison, Inc. (Con Edison) (NYSE: ED) today reported 2026 first quarter net income for common stock of $924 million or $2.55 a share compared with $791 million or $2.26 a share in the 2025 first quarter. Adjusted earnings (non-GAAP) were $790 million or $2.18 a share in the 2026 period compared with $792 million or $2.26 a share in the 2025 period. Adjusted earnings and adjusted earnings per share in the 2026 period exclude transaction costs associated with the strategic alternatives
